popularStory.headline: Capt. Anthony Eames (9 January 1595 – 6 October 1686)
popularStory.description:
Capt. Anthony Eames was born about 1595 in Fordington, Dorsetshire, England.1,2 He was the son of Thomas Eames and Millicent Brewster. 

About 1615 Anthony, married Margery Pierce, daughter of John …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Captain Anthony Eames於大約1595年出生在英國多瑟特福丁頓時，他的父親Thomas Eames48歲，母親Millicent45歲。他於1614年與Margery在英國多瑟特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1633年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼並於1646年住在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯辛加姆且於1652年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼馬爾費爾德。他於1644年登記服兵役。他去世於1686年10月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯馬爾費爾德享年92歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼馬爾費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Captain Anthony Eames于大约1595年出生在英国多瑟特福丁頓时，他的父亲Thomas Eames48岁，母亲Millicent45岁。他于1614年与Margery在英国多瑟特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1633年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼并于1646年住在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯辛加姆且于1652年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼馬爾費爾德。他于1644年登记服兵役。他去世于1686年10月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯馬爾費爾德享年92岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼馬爾費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Eames
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English eme, eim ‘uncle’ (Old English ēam). Most of the modern variants of the surname have post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Captain Anthony Eames was born about 1595, in Fordington, Dorset, England, his father, Thomas Eames, was 48 and his mother, Millicent, was 45. He married Margery in 1614, in Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He immigrated to Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1633 and lived in Hingham, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States in 1646 and Marshfield, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1652. He registered for military service in 1644. He died on 6 October 1686, in Marshfield, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 92, and was buried in Marshfield, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Captain Anthony Eames est né environ 1595, à Fordington, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Eames, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Millicent, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Margery en 1614, à Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il a immigré au Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1633 et a vécu à Hingham, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1646 et à Marshfield, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1652. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1644. Il est décédé le 6 octobre 1686, à Marshfield, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterré à Marshfield, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Captain Anthony Eames um 1595 in Fordington, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Eames 48 und seine Mutter Millicent 45. Er hat 1614 in Dorset, England Margery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er ist 1633 nach Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. 1646 hat er in Hingham, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und 1652 in Marshfield, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er hat sich 1644 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 6. Oktober 1686 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Marshfield, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Marshfield, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Captain Anthony Eames è nato il circa 1595 nel Fordington, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Thomas Eames, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Millicent, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Margery nel 1614, nel Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Immigrato nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1633 e vissuto a Hingham, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1646 e nel Marshfield, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1652. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1644. Morì il 6 ottobre 1686, nel Marshfield, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 92 anni, e fu sepolto a Marshfield, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Captain Anthony Eamesが約1595年にイギリスドールセトフォーディントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Eamesは48歳，母Millicentは45歳であった。1614年にイギリスドールセトでMargeryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1633年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーに移住し，1646年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスヒンガムに，1652年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーマーシュフィールドに住んでいた。彼は1644年に兵役登録をした。彼は1686年10月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスマーシュフィールドで92歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーマーシュフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Captain Anthony Eames(이)가 대략 1595년 영국 도르세트 포딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Eames(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Millicent(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1614년 영국 도르세트에서 Margery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1633년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이로 이민을 떠났고, 1646년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 잉함에서, 1652년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 마스h필드에서 살았다. 그는 1644년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1686년 10월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 마스h필드에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 마스h필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Captain Anthony Eames nasceu aproximadamente 1595, em Fordington, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Eames, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Millicent, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery em 1614, em Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1633 e viveu em Hingham, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1646 e em Marshfield, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1652. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1644. Ele faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1686, em Marshfield, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 92 anos, e foi sepultado em Marshfield, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Captain Anthony Eames родился около 1595 г. в местности фордингтон, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Eames было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Millicent, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery в 1614 г. в местности дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он иммигрировал в массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1633 году, а также жил в местности хингхам, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1646 году и в местности маршфиелд, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1652 году. В 1644 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 6 октября 1686 г. в местности маршфиелд, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 92 лет и был похоронен в местности маршфиелд, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Captain Anthony Eames nació aproximadamente 1595, en Fordington, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Eames, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Millicent, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Margery en 1614, en Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Inmigró a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1633 y vivió en Hingham, Plymouth, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1646 y en Marshfield, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1652. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1644. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1686, en Marshfield, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 92 años, y fue sepultado en Marshfield, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.
